options.name: --additional-namespace
options.description: Add additional namespace to generated types

options.name: --cancellation-tokens
options.description: Use cancellation tokens

options.name: --collection-format
options.description:
The collection format to use for query parameters. Default 
is Multi.
May be one of:
- Multi: Multiple parameter instances rather than multiple values. Only 
supported for the in: query and in: formData parameters. 
(?param=value1&param=value2)
- Csv: Comma-separated values. (?param=value1,value2)
- Ssv: Space-separated values. (?param=value1 value2)
- Tsv: Tab-separated values. (?param=value1\tvalue2)
- Pipes: Pipe-separated values. (?param=value1|value2)    
See 
https://swagger.io/docs/specification/v2_0/describing-parameters/#array-and-mult
i-value-parameters for more information.

options.name: --contract-only
options.description: Don't generate clients

options.name: --contracts-namespace
options.description:
Default namespace to use for generated 
contracts

options.name: --contracts-output
options.description:
Output path for generated contracts. Enabling this 
automatically enables generating multiple files

options.name: --disposable
options.description:
Generate refit clients that implement 
IDisposable

options.name: --exclude-namespace
options.description: Exclude namespace on generated types

options.name: --immutable-records
options.description:
Generate contracts as immutable records instead of 
classes

options.name: --include-inheritance-hierarchy
options.description:
Keep all possible inherited types/union types even if they 
are not directly used.

options.name: --interface-only
options.description: Don't generate contract types

options.name: --internal
options.description:
Set the accessibility of the generated types to 
'internal'

options.name: --keep-schema
options.description:
Force to keep matching schema, uses regular expressions. 
Use together with "--trim-unused-schema". Can be set multiple 
times.

options.name: --match-path
options.description:
Only include Paths that match the provided regular 
expression. May be set multiple times.

options.name: --multiple-files
options.description:
Generate multiple files instead of a single large file.
The output files can be the following:
- RefitInterfaces.cs
- DependencyInjection.cs
- Contracts.cs

options.name: --multiple-interfaces
options.description:
Generate a Refit interface for each endpoint. May be one of
ByEndpoint, ByTag

options.name: --namespace
options.description: Default namespace to use for generated types

options.name: --no-accept-headers
options.description:
Don't add <Accept> header to output 
file

options.name: --no-auto-generated-header
options.description:
Don't add <auto-generated> header to output 
file

options.name: --no-banner
options.description: Don't show donation banner

options.name: --no-deprecated-operations
options.description: Don't generate deprecated operations

options.name: --no-logging
options.description: Don't log errors or collect telemetry

options.name: --no-operation-headers
options.description: Don't generate operation headers

options.name: --operation-name-generator
options.description:
The NSwag IOperationNameGenerator implementation to use.
May be one of:
- Default
- MultipleClientsFromOperationId
- MultipleClientsFromPathSegments
- MultipleClientsFromFirstTagAndOperationId
- MultipleClientsFromFirstTagAndOperationName
- MultipleClientsFromFirstTagAndPathSegments
- SingleClientFromOperationId
- SingleClientFromPathSegments
See 
https://refitter.github.io/api/Refitter.Core.OperationNameGeneratorTypes.html 
for more information.

options.name: --operation-name-template
options.description:
Generate operation names using pattern. When using 
--multiple-interfaces ByEndpoint, this is name of the Execute() method in the 
interface.

options.name: --optional-nullable-parameters
options.description:
Generate nullable parameters as optional 
parameters

options.name: --output
options.description:
Path to Output file or folder (if multiple files are 
generated)

options.name: --settings-file
options.description:
Path to .refitter settings file. Specifying this will 
ignore all other settings (except for --output)

options.name: --skip-default-additional-properties
options.description:
Set to true to skip default additional 
properties

options.name: --skip-validation
options.description: Skip validation of the OpenAPI specification

options.name: --tag
options.description:
Only include Endpoints that contain this tag. May be set 
multiple times and result in OR'ed evaluation.

options.name: --trim-unused-schema
options.description:
Removes unreferenced components schema to keep the 
generated output to a minimum

options.name: --use-api-response
options.description:
Return Task<IApiResponse<T>> instead of 
Task<T>

options.name: --use-apizr
options.description:
Use Apizr by:
- Adding a final IApizrRequestOptions options parameter to all generated methods
- Providing cancellation tokens by Apizr request options instead of a dedicated 
parameter
- Using method overloads instead of optional parameters
See https://refitter.github.io for more information and https://www.apizr.net to
get started with Apizr.

options.name: --use-dynamic-querystring-parameters
options.description:
Enable wrapping multiple query parameters into a single 
complex one. Default is no wrapping.
See 
https://github.com/reactiveui/refit?tab=readme-ov-file#dynamic-querystring-param
eters for more information.

options.name: --use-iso-date-format
options.description:
Explicitly format date query string parameters in ISO 8601 
standard date format using delimiters (2023-06-15)

options.name: --use-observable-response
options.description: Return IObservable instead of Task

options.name: --use-polymorphic-serialization
options.description:
Use System.Text.Json polymorphic serialization.
Replaces NSwag JsonInheritanceConverter attributes with System.Text.Json 
JsonPolymorphicAttributes.
To have the native support of inheritance (de)serialization and fallback to base
types when
payloads with (yet) unknown types are offered by newer versions of an API
See 
https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/standard/serialization/system-text-json
/polymorphism for more information

arguments.name: URL or input file
arguments.description:
URL or file path to OpenAPI Specification 
file
